review_text: I’m visiting from out of town and decided to schedule a session while I’m here; my tattoo is a quarter sleeve. Kayla was so awesome! She was informative, patient and quick with the treatment. I didn’t feel rushed while the area was being iced and she took the time to show me progress pictures. Her technique with the laser was the most efficient and least painful I’ve experienced; she made sure the cold air was right on the area, taking away a lot of the laser sensation. I really wish my home studio provided the same experience. I will definitely return if I’m ever in the area again!
Great staff, clean facility, no long waits, great with HIPAA privacy compliance, and exceptional services.
Amazing service always!

Ivana was incredibly kind and patient throughout my tattoo removal session. I wouldn’t consider myself the easiest patient, but she was an absolute angel—giving me the time I needed to work through the pain with complete understanding and zero judgment. She’s knowledgeable, compassionate, and everything you could hope for in a technician.

Once again another great visit by Ivana, her expertise and knowledge is incredible and it helps knowing I am in good hands.

Very nice place. People were very friendly and knowledgeable. I was so impressed with my consultation I went ahead and got my tattooed eyebrows removed.  They told me what to expect and made me comfortable. Would definitely recommend them for tattoo removal.
Very professional. I love the Facility, Ladies always had a smile on their face. They work with you on your Tattoo. Overall it was just amazing
Great team, great experience and Ivana is incredible.
Very fast and efficient-feel so relaxed and in knowledgeable hands during visit

Ivana is the best she’s quick and makes sure you are comfortable the whole time, she even played No Doubt music which distracted me while we did my treatment which was awesome and made it more enjoyable :)
Always look forward to coming. My removal is coming along very well. So thankful for ivana! She’s so sweet and gentle. Except with the laser hahaha

UPDATE! (09/23/25)- This location on West Shore Blvd continues to deliver an excellent customer experience for me (and my fam) each time we visit! This time I want to highlight Ivana for attention to detail. This may sound a little but she remembered the Halloween costume my wife and I wore the year prior and asked me about it during my visit. It felt nice to talk about that fun memory and by the time she was done asking me about it- the session was done! The little things make this uncomfortable process easy, and I just wanted to say how much I appreciated it! Thank you

Original review (sometime in June I think)- Removery is pretty professional in general, but Daleena at the Tampa location on West Shore makes my visit enjoyable each visit! Everyone at this location is great but Daleena is the one I've worked with the most and her calm demeanor and conversation help take a bit of the sting away. I highly recommend this location and if you get the opportunity- ask for Daleena!

💯
Ivana was amazing! The service was comfortable and quick.

I've been for 2 sessions so far and the staff has been fabulous. In my last session, Ivana was fantastic. Talked with me through different positions, as I had just had a surgery that didn't allow me to lie flat. She was fast and made it a comfortable experience. Thank you!!
Love my tech! She is adorable, funny and keeps me calm during a somewhat painful process!! Thank you so much ❤️❤️‍🩹
This place is so good, the team is very nice ✨ Madi is so kind
The staff is very nice and friendly! Kayla is great and explains everything very well!

This has been such an amazing experience! Truly, it’s not pain-free. But with the help of the ladies there, they talk you through it, give you positive words, and conversation to help occupy the mind during treatment. They are so good at what they do. 😁
Ivana was great and answered all my questions! very easy getting started with removery
Daleena is great, she is so professional and kind

Ivana is the absolute best, she is my favorite. She is always so kind and welcoming whenever I come. She makes me feel at home. I just love her to pieces 💜 she is always asking me what she can do to make my experience more comfortable!! I hope I get her next time! ☺️☺️

Adding on bc I got lucky enough to have her again!!
Ivana was so wonderful. She is so caring. It was one of my best experiences. She is the BEST of the BEST. One day I called and she wasn’t there and I was worried she no longer worked there :( but she was just off 🤣 shessss my girl 💜💜 and she’s so pretty ♥️

PERFECTION 😍😍

😍😍😍🥰
The girls were amazing very professional and encouraged me throughout the process. Will definitely be recommending them to all my friends
Ivana was great as always. In and out quickly. Easy to schedule next session.

Calm and professional environment. Ivana explained everything clearly, was funny when appropriate and that calmed my nerves. During the procedure, she kept me informed on the progress. Highly recommend.
Ivana was so sweet! Thank you!!

Ivana at Removery in Tampa is amazing! She has been doing my tattoo removal and every visit is a great experience. She is always so friendly, takes the time to explain everything in detail, and makes me feel completely comfortable throughout the process. You can tell she truly cares about her clients. Highly recommend her!

Today was my 12th and 13th  treatment.
Al of the practitioners are always very professional, knowledgeable, kind and courteous.
They work very fast yet very precise. They get you in and out and are always right on time- no waiting.
The facility is very clean and clinical,  but inviting and comfortable.
All of my experiences with the Removery Tampa have been very positive.
I am getting great results and have had zero complications or reactions.
I would highly recommend the Removery Tampa to anyone contemplating tattoo removal.

Set up and approval was easy. So was getting payments to my liking. This place is legit and you are treated by PAs. This is not some questionable practice and they are very professional. My PA was Kayla. She is very caring and personable. I’ve worked with Ivana also. The entire staff are brilliant! The actual removal process was nothing like I thought it would be. Super quick and easy. I def recommend them! I went to the Tampa Westshore location.
Great first session with everyone at Removery! From consultation to removal session with Daleena everyone was great. Looking forward to continuing my tattoo removal journey with Removery!

It was very professional and Ivana took great care of
Me as well….

Have been receiving treatment since November and am happy with the fading progress so far. Daleena is great, and  Kaylah is very nice and careful with the process, also very thorough with the lazor. Will update with photos as the fading occurs
Thank you Renee & Ivana for making my first appointment so easy. I can’t wait to share my end results.◡̈

Staff was incredibly knowledgeable and friendly. They made sure I had a plan that worked for me. I love that if you are paying for removal it’s not over unless the tattoo is 💯 % gone. Ivana was kind and supportive during the treatment. Highly recommend.
Session 1 complete!
For my first session it was fast, the staff was professional. Look forward to the continued progress! Ivana has definitely been getting results!
Ivana was amazing, all the staff was so helpful and kind. Amazing deal on services as well. Will recommend everyone to come here!
Ivana does great work and is incredibly friendly. Highly recommend removery and Ivana :)

Kayla and Ivana at Removery are so easy to work with. While the process of removing your tattoo is not pain-free, It’s definitely manageable and  worth it . I can’t wait to see my end results. Only on session 2, and I’m seeing a good amount of fading already.

This was my third tattoo removal session at Removery, and every experience has been outstanding. I’m getting a hand tattoo removed, and the level of professionalism, care, and consistency has been incredible each time.

Kayla was phenomenal today. She was  friendly, knowledgeable, and made the entire process smooth and comfortable. She took the time to explain everything and made sure I was completely at ease.

Removery truly sets the high bar for tattoo removal. Five-star service all the way. Highly recommend.

For context: image on the steering wheel is today (March ‘26, third session), about 20 min post session. Image with the ruler was before my first session in December ‘25
Ivana was super helpful and nice specially understanding while hurting
I had a great experience today with Ivana as usual. Clean environment, easy process, minimal pain. I’ve been going to that location for 2 years now and no issues. Highly recommend.
Ivana is so amazing, helpful, sweet and knowledgeable. Makes the process so easy.

Ivanna is really sweet and asked me for aa many breaks as needed. I am getting a huge peice removed it wasn't bad

It gets less painful the longer you go :)

A great place, with fantastic results and wonderful people. Ivana is amazing. I can't say enough about her. Such a professional, kind person. She makes the whole process quick, thorough, and as painless as possible. I've had 6 or 7 sessions and it gets easier every time. I actually look forward to my visits now. If you're considering a tattoo removal, this is the place and Ivana is the person. Don't think twice.

Ivana is excellent! She got me in a little early, was very pleasant and professional!
Another great experience and the results are great!
Ivana is awesome! She’s always sweet and reassuring throughout the whole process. I’ve been coming here for a little over 2 years and always have a great experience!
I had a free consultation with Renee. She was professional, personable and explained the entire process.

I chose this company because of the reputation & exceptional reviews online. Today was my first appointment for a consultation. Renee helped walk me through the process and answered any questions that I had. She even broke down the pricing. I opted to do their unlimited sessions for a discounted price. The financing process was very easy & was able to get 0% interest which made it a very affordable monthly payment option. They also were able to do my first session while I was there. Ivana was the tech who performed my session. She had a gentle hand and prepared me for what to expect. The whole staff was beyond friendly & professional. I am glad I chose Removery Tampa!

Update: 3/17/26

I just completed my third tattoo removal session and I’m very pleased with the results so far. The fading is definitely noticeable. I also have to mention how wonderful the staff is. Everyone is friendly, professional, and makes the whole process comfortable. I always have a great experience here.
